## Context

<!-- Which part of the paper or the Lean formalization you're asking
     about. Link or quote the relevant statement. -->

## Question

<!-- The question itself. Concrete is easier to answer than vague;
     if you're asking about a proof step, state what you think the
     step is doing and where your confusion is. -->

## What you've already checked

<!-- e.g. "I read §6.5 and §9.6.3, and the CHANGELOG v0.6.2 entry
     about the Theorem 2 demotion." Not required, but useful. -->
